title: gentiana montana f. novae-zelandiae
intro: Gentiana montana f. novae-zelandiae, also known as Alpine Gentian, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It is a variant of the Gentiana montana species, characterized by its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Gentiana montana f. novae-zelandiae include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
